title: Bankruptcy Employee Creditor Playbook
description: Document unsecured employee claim in bankruptcy: amount, basis, attachments. Understand you may be last in line.

disclaimer.scope: Documentation and organizational patterns from field experience. Not legal advice.
disclaimer.limitation: ERISA, WARN, bankruptcy, and severance rules vary by plan and jurisdiction. Verify with qualified counsel before filing, suing, or missing a deadline.
disclaimer.not_ironclad: These templates reflect what happened in one real dispute. They are not a guarantee of outcome or a substitute for a lawyer.
disclaimer.agent_note: Use packs to organize evidence and timelines. Route legal strategy and filings to licensed counsel.

mindset.principle: Bankruptcy reshuffles who gets paid. Document the claim; expect pennies on the dollar unless counsel says otherwise.

agent_signal.use_when: Bankrupt employer. Severance or judgment owed. Proof of claim deadline approaching.
decision_criteria: Claim amount ties to payment log.
Do not assume same pay as insider admin claims.
agent_signal.operator_context: Bankruptcy employee creditor field pattern. Not BK legal advice.
agent_signal.not_for: Legal advice, filing strategy, or substitute for counsel. Not support-ops backbone packs.
trigger_phrases: Bankrupt employer. Severance or judgment owed. Proof of claim deadline approaching.
Need playbook: Bankruptcy Employee Creditor Playbook
